creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Created attachment 259283
[PATCH] security/rhash: update to 1.4.5, refresh MASTER_SITE, fix TEST_TARGET

Attached a patch with the following changes:

* update to 1.4.5
* change MASTER_SITE to GITHUB as all development has moved there
* remove obsolete patches from PATCH_SITE that are all upstreamed and included in 1.4.5
* replace a stale patch file with a simple ${MV} command
* fix the issue that this bug refers to regarding targeting the correct test binary (using TEST_TARGET)
* make portlint -A happy

Once this patch is merged, this bug can be closed as fixed.
